source_metadata.title: 2024/11/07 - Petitions
source_metadata.description:
7 November 2024 | Petitions Committee

Petition of Carjam Online Ltd: Reverse plans for the NZTA to charge for free stolen status data in October; Petition of Angela Clifford: Government facilitates development of a national food strategy for Aotearoa

Submitters

Petition of Carjam Online Ltd: Reverse plans for the NZTA to charge for free stolen status data in October

Carjam Online Limited
- Paul Osborne, CEO

Waka Kotahi
- Chris Rodley, National Manager, Regulatory System Design
- Meredith Ussher, Group General Counsel

Petition of Angela Clifford: Government facilitates development of a national food strategy for Aotearoa

Angela Clifford 

Ministry for Primary Industries:
- Sarah Reader, Manager Food Policy Trans-Tasman

Ministry of Health:
- Michelle Mako, Director, Māori Public Health | Hauora Maori Tumatanu
